message:
test(workflows): add 26 unit tests for codex_exit session parsing and device auth

Tests cover parse_number, capture_number, extract_token_usage,
find_token_usage_line, find_session_id, find_reset_time,
parse_codex_session_summary (complete, partial, missing fields, error display),
codex_session_record_from_summary, CodexExitOptions default,
parse_device_code (standard, with URL, not found, case conversion),
validate_device_code (valid, too short, no dash, multiple dashes, special chars),
and DeviceCodeParseError display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
